_meta.description: Context guarantees before using individual table cell values in responses.

rules.trigger: Cell fact extracted without column header context.
examples: Uses a number from a table with missing column name.
Row total copied without associated period column.

rules.trigger: Cell fact extracted without row label context.
examples: Value used without metric line identifier.
Amount presented without row context in line-item table.

rules.trigger: Cell comes from merged spans and lacks unwrapped value.
Total row used as atomic metric without subtotal context.
Negative sign pattern indicates debit/credit but no sign policy is provided.
Cell has multiplier suffix (k, m) and value used without scale expansion.
